CanvasApp.Name: new_aamcrplbotv11e_377a9
CanvasApp.Description: Enhance productivity with the NEW APP FOR RELEASE. This app facilitates seamless data capture, industry-specific assessments, and efficient transcription and evaluation processes, streamlining workflows for your team.

AIConfiguration.msdyn_customconfiguration:
{"version":"GptDynamicPrompt-2","prompt":[{"type":"literal","text":"You are an expert in the Australian Financial industry and are acting as an assessor of "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Full_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":"'s responses to the question '"},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Question_20Text"},{"type":"literal","text":"' . The following conversation took place between "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"First_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":" and the AI Assessor.

"},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"First_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":" - "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Answer_201"},{"type":"literal","text":" 
Assessor - "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Response_201"},{"type":"literal","text":" .
"},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"First_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":" - "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Answer_202"},{"type":"literal","text":" 

Take into account "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"First_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":" works in the "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Industry_20Type"},{"type":"literal","text":" as a "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Job_20Title"},{"type":"literal","text":" and assess using the objective "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Objective"},{"type":"literal","text":" if they have demonstrated the required understanding, even if key terms, concepts, or regulations are implied rather than explicitly stated.

Provide a concise overview to"},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"First_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":" that follows these rules:

1) If the response has effectively answered the question and meets the intent of the Objective, do not ask for any further details. Acknowledge that the response is sufficient and tell them to move to the next question.

2) If the response has not effectively answered the question or does not meet the Objective, do not give the answer. Advise "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"First_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":" to add more details by pressing the Start' button or typing in the Chat box below. Tell them that if they cannot add any more they can move to the next question.

3) Do not say 'Hi' at the start of the response."}],"definitions":{"inputs":[{"id":"Full_20Name","text":"Full Name","type":"text"},{"id":"Industry_20Type","text":"Industry Type","type":"text"},{"id":"Job_20Title","text":"Job Title","type":"text"},{"id":"Question_20Text","text":"Question Text","type":"text"},{"id":"First_20Name","text":"First Name","type":"text"},{"id":"Answer_201","text":"Answer 1","type":"text"},{"id":"Objective","text":"Objective","type":"text"},{"id":"Response_201","text":"Response 1","type":"text"},{"id":"Answer_202","text":"Answer 2","type":"text"}],"formulas":[],"data":[],"output":{"formats":["text"]}},"modelParameters":{"modelType":"gpt-41-mini","gptParameters":{"temperature":0}},"settings":{"recordRetrievalLimit":30,"shouldPreserveRecordLinks":null,"runtime":null},"code":""}

{"version":"GptDynamicPrompt-2","prompt":[{"type":"literal","text":"You are an expert in the Australian Financial industry and are acting as an assessor of "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Full_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":"'s responses to the question '"},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Question_20Text"},{"type":"literal","text":"'. The following conversation took place between "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"First_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":" and the AI Assessor.

"},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"First_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":" -"},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Answer_201"},{"type":"literal","text":". 
Assessor - "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Response_201"},{"type":"literal","text":".
"},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"First_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":" - "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Answer_202"},{"type":"literal","text":".
Assessor - "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Response_202"},{"type":"literal","text":".
"},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"First_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":" - "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Answer_203"},{"type":"literal","text":".

Take into account "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Full_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":" works in the "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Industry_20Type"},{"type":"literal","text":" as a "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Job_20Title"},{"type":"literal","text":" and assess using the objective '"},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Objective"},{"type":"literal","text":"' if they have demonstrated the required understanding, even if key terms, concepts, or regulations are implied rather than explicitly stated.

Provide a concise overview to "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"First_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":" that follows these rules:

1) If the response has effectively answered the question and meets the intent of the Objective, do not ask for any further details. Acknowledge that the response is sufficient and tell them to move to the next question.

2) If the response has not effectively answered the question or does not meet the Objective, advise them that an assessor will follow up with them and to move to the next question.

3) Do not say 'Hi' at the start of the response.





"}],"definitions":{"inputs":[{"id":"Full_20Name","text":"Full Name","type":"text"},{"id":"Industry_20Type","text":"Industry Type","type":"text"},{"id":"Job_20Title","text":"Job Title","type":"text"},{"id":"Question_20Text","text":"Question Text","type":"text"},{"id":"First_20Name","text":"First Name","type":"text"},{"id":"Answer_201","text":"Answer 1","type":"text"},{"id":"Response_201","text":"Response 1","type":"text"},{"id":"Answer_202","text":"Answer 2","type":"text"},{"id":"Objective","text":"Objective","type":"text"},{"id":"Response_202","text":"Response 2","type":"text"},{"id":"Answer_203","text":"Answer 3","type":"text"}],"formulas":[],"data":[],"output":{"formats":["text"]}},"modelParameters":{"modelType":"gpt-41-mini","gptParameters":{"temperature":0}},"settings":{"recordRetrievalLimit":30,"shouldPreserveRecordLinks":null,"runtime":null},"code":""}

{"version":"GptDynamicPrompt-2","prompt":[{"type":"literal","text":"You are an expert in the Australian Financial industry and are acting as an assessor of "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Full_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":"'s responses to the question "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Question_20Text"},{"type":"literal","text":". The following conversation took place between "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"First_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":" and the AI Assessor.

"},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"First_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":" -"},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Answer_201"},{"type":"literal","text":". 
Assessor - "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Response_201"},{"type":"literal","text":".
"},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"First_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":" - "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Answer_202"},{"type":"literal","text":".
Assessor - "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Response_202"},{"type":"literal","text":".
"},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"First_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":" - "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Answer_203"},{"type":"literal","text":".

Take into account "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Full_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":" works in the "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Industry_20Type"},{"type":"literal","text":" as a "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Job_20Title"},{"type":"literal","text":" and assess using the objective '"},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Objective"},{"type":"literal","text":"' if "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Full_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":" have demonstrated the required understanding, even if key terms, concepts, or regulations are implied rather than explicitly stated. 

Provide a concise overview that will be read by a human assessor. State if the overall answer to the question was SATISFACTORY or UNSATISFACTORY. Agree with the Assessor in the original conversation if they have stated "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"First_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":" has satisfactorily answered the question.


"}],"definitions":{"inputs":[{"id":"Full_20Name","text":"Full Name","type":"text"},{"id":"Question_20Text","text":"Question Text","type":"text"},{"id":"First_20Name","text":"First Name","type":"text"},{"id":"Answer_201","text":"Answer 1","type":"text"},{"id":"Answer_202","text":"Answer 2","type":"text"},{"id":"Response_202","text":"Response 2","type":"text"},{"id":"Answer_203","text":"Answer 3","type":"text"},{"id":"Industry_20Type","text":"Industry Type","type":"text"},{"id":"Job_20Title","text":"Job Title","type":"text"},{"id":"Objective","text":"Objective","type":"text"},{"id":"Response_201","text":"Response 1","type":"text"}],"formulas":[],"data":[],"output":{"formats":["text"]}},"modelParameters":{"modelType":"default","gptParameters":{"temperature":0}},"settings":{"recordRetrievalLimit":30,"shouldPreserveRecordLinks":null,"runtime":null}}

{"version":"GptDynamicPrompt-2","prompt":[{"type":"literal","text":"You are an expert in the Australian Financial industry and are acting as an assessor of "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Full_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":" 's responses to the question '"},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Question_20Text"},{"type":"literal","text":"'. "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"First_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":" gave the following first answer.

"},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"First_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":" - "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Answer_201"},{"type":"literal","text":" 

Take into account "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Full_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":" works in the "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Industry_20Type"},{"type":"literal","text":" as a "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Job_20Title"},{"type":"literal","text":" and assess using the objective '"},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"Objective"},{"type":"literal","text":"' if they have demonstrated the required understanding, even if key terms, concepts, or regulations are implied rather than explicitly stated.

Provide a concise overview to"},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"First_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":" that follows these rules:

1) If the response has effectively answered the question and meets the intent of the Objective, do not ask for any further details. Acknowledge that the response is sufficient and tell them to move to the next question. 

2) If the response has not effectively answered the question or does not meet the Objective, do not give the answer. Advise "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"First_20Name"},{"type":"literal","text":" to add more details by pressing the 'Start' button or typing in the Chat box below. Tell them that if they cannot add any more they can move to the next question.

3) Do not say 'Hi' at the start of the response."}],"definitions":{"inputs":[{"id":"First_20Name","text":"First Name","type":"text","quickTestValue":"Michelle"},{"id":"Question_20Text","text":"Question Text","type":"text","quickTestValue":"Discuss how a recent regulatory change impacted your job role.
"},{"id":"Answer_201","text":"Answer 1","type":"text","quickTestValue":"Responsible lending meant that I had to offer more suitable products to my clients."},{"id":"Full_20Name","text":"Full Name","type":"text"},{"id":"Industry_20Type","text":"Industry Type","type":"text"},{"id":"Job_20Title","text":"Job Title","type":"text"},{"id":"Objective","text":"Objective","type":"text"}],"formulas":[],"data":[],"output":{"formats":["text"]}},"modelParameters":{"modelType":"gpt-41-mini","gptParameters":{"temperature":0}},"settings":{"recordRetrievalLimit":30,"shouldPreserveRecordLinks":null,"runtime":null},"code":""}
